nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.comment: Accepts JSON: { prompt (required), width (optional, default 1024), height (optional, default 1024), steps (optional, default 20), cfg (optional, default 8.0), seed (optional, random if not set), channel (optional) }

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.comment: Validates prompt is present and within limits. Clamps dimensions/steps/CFG to safe ranges.

parameters.body: ={{ { "prompt": { "3": { "inputs": { "seed": $json.seed, "steps": $json.steps, "cfg": $json.cfg, "sampler_name": "euler", "scheduler": "normal", "denoise": 1.0, "model": ["4", 0], "positive": ["6", 0], "negative": ["7", 0], "latent_image": ["5", 0] }, "class_type": "KSampler" }, "4": { "inputs": { "ckpt_name": $env.COMFYUI_MODEL_NAME || 'flux1-dev.safetensors' }, "class_type": "CheckpointLoaderSimple" }, "5": { "inputs": { "width": $json.width, "height": $json.height, "batch_size": 1 }, "class_type": "EmptyLatentImage" }, "6": { "inputs": { "text": $json.prompt, "clip": ["4", 1] }, "class_type": "CLIPTextEncode" }, "7": { "inputs": { "text": "text, watermark, blurry, low quality", "clip": ["4", 1] }, "class_type": "CLIPTextEncode" }, "8": { "inputs": { "samples": ["3", 0], "vae": ["4", 2] }, "class_type": "VAEDecode" }, "9": { "inputs": { "filename_prefix": 'n8n_' + new Date().getTime(), "images": ["8", 0] }, "class_type": "SaveImage" } }, "client_id": 'n8n_' + new Date().getTime() } }}

nodes.name: Process Response
nodes.comment: Uses $('Validate Input') to access validated payload fields directly

parameters.text:
={{ '*ComfyUI Image Queued* 🎨

**Prompt:** ' + (($json.prompt || '').toString().slice(0, 97).trimEnd()) + (($json.prompt || '').length > 97 ? '...' : '') + '
**Size:** ' + ($json.width || 1024) + 'x' + ($json.height || 1024) + '
**Steps:** ' + ($json.steps || 20) + ' | **CFG:** ' + ($json.cfg || 8.0) + '
**Seed:** ' + ($json.seed || 'random') + '

**Prompt ID:** `' + ($json.prompt_id || 'unknown') + '`
**Queue #:** ' + ($json.queue_number || 0) + '

✅ Image generation started! Check ComfyUI for results.' }}

nodes.name: Discord Output
nodes.comment: Sends queue confirmation with clean prompt truncation (ellipsis)

parameters.text:
={{ '*ComfyUI Generation Failed* ❌

**Error:** ' + (($input.all()[0]?.error?.message || $input.all()[0]?.error?.description || 'Unknown error')).toString().slice(0, 997).trimEnd() + '

Please check:
- ComfyUI service is running
- FLUX.1 model is loaded
- GPU has sufficient VRAM' }}

nodes.name: Discord Error
nodes.comment: Uses $('Webhook Trigger') for channel (available when validation fails); $input.all()[0].error for error details
